Appearances:

Defendant Ignacio Lopez is present.

Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.501, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of May-7-2012 is vacated. (D501)
